creator: moe@notthebe.ee
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #3)
I'm not sure how to do that. I've tried to run sysctl -a | grep temperature in a loop while trying to suspend and resume, and I got thrown out of X.org into the console which displayed a message "WARNING: current temperature [128°C] is unsafe" or something like that, after that my PC halted.
I'm pretty sure that if my CPU went up to 128°C it would either shut down automatically by BIOS, or I wouldn't be writing this right now.
